ResearchProjectDef.label: early flight
ResearchProjectDef.description: Learn to construct early planes, based on blueprints from the beginning of the 20th century.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->built and tested fragile powered gliders in uncontrolled conditions
subject_story->studied lift, drag, and control instability in first-generation aircraft
subject_story->pioneered wing-warping and primitive control surface designs

ResearchProjectDef.label: biplane theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Study structural aerodynamics and load distribution principles that make rigid, multi-wing aircraft possible.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->developed reinforced wing bracing systems for early military aircraft
subject_story->studied aerodynamic instability in lightweight monoplanes
subject_story->contributed to early airframe stress analysis methods
